w7:reasonForApplying.label: Reason for applying
w7:reasonForApplying.so: Tani waa sababta aad u codsanayso lambarka ITIN — tusaale ahaan, qof shisheeye ah oo soo gudbinaya canshuur Maraykan ah, ama qof ay ku tiirsan tahay muwaadin ama deggan rasmi ah oo Maraykan ah.
w7:reasonForApplying.en: This is the reason you're applying for an ITIN — for example, being a foreign national filing a U.S. tax return, or being a dependent of a U.S. citizen or resident.

w7:dateOfBirth.label: Date of birth
w7:dateOfBirth.so: Tani waa taariikhda dhalashada applicant-ka, sida ku qoran dukumentiga aqoonsiga.
w7:dateOfBirth.en: This is the applicant's date of birth, as shown on their identification document.

w7:countryOfCitizenship.label: Country of citizenship
w7:countryOfCitizenship.so: Tani waa dalka uu applicant-ku jinsiyad u leeyahay.
w7:countryOfCitizenship.en: This is the country the applicant is a citizen of.

w7:idDocumentType.label: ID document type
w7:idDocumentType.so: Tani waa nooca dukumentiga aqoonsiga ee la soo gudbiyay si loo xaqiijiyo aqoonsiga applicant-ka, sida baasaboor.
w7:idDocumentType.en: This is the type of ID document submitted to prove the applicant's identity, like a passport.
